mapper.select: SELECT EP.PROM_ID, EP.PROM_TITLE, EP.PROM_DETAIL, EP.CREATE_DATE, EP.UPDATE_DATE, EP.VIEWS, I.CHANGE_NAME AS POSTER_PATH, I.ORIGIN_NAME AS ORIGINAL_FILENAME, I.IMG_NO, EA.WEBSITE AS PROMOTION_PAGE_URL, AS2.STAT_CODE AS IS_PROMOTED, EA.APP_ID, U.NICKNAME AS PROMO_WRITER, EA.START_DATE AS START_DATE, EA.END_DATE AS END_DATE FROM EVENT_PROMOTION EP JOIN EVENT_APPLICATION EA ON EP.APP_ID = EA.APP_ID LEFT JOIN APP_STATUS AS2 ON EA.STAT_CODE = AS2.STAT_CODE LEFT JOIN IMAGE I ON EP.PROM_ID = I.REF_NO AND I.IMG_TYPE = 'P' LEFT JOIN USERS U ON EA.USER_NO = U.USER_NO ORDER BY EP.PROM_ID DESC OFFSET #{pi.offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pi.limit} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EVENT_PROMOTION EP JOIN EVENT_APPLICATION EA ON EP.APP_ID = EA.APP_ID
WHERE EP.PROM_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'

SELECT EP.PROM_ID, EP.PROM_TITLE, EP.PROM_DETAIL, EP.CREATE_DATE, EP.UPDATE_DATE, EP.VIEWS, I.CHANGE_NAME AS POSTER_PATH, I.ORIGIN_NAME AS ORIGINAL_FILENAME, I.IMG_NO, EA.WEBSITE AS PROMOTION_PAGE_URL, AS2.STAT_CODE AS IS_PROMOTED, EA.APP_ID, U.NICKNAME AS PROMO_WRITER, EA.START_DATE AS START_DATE, EA.END_DATE AS END_DATE FROM EVENT_PROMOTION EP JOIN EVENT_APPLICATION EA ON EP.APP_ID = EA.APP_ID LEFT JOIN APP_STATUS AS2 ON EA.STAT_CODE = AS2.STAT_CODE LEFT JOIN IMAGE I ON EP.PROM_ID = I.REF_NO AND I.IMG_TYPE = 'P' LEFT JOIN USERS U ON EA.USER_NO = U.USER_NO
WHERE EP.PROM_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'
ORDER BY EP.PROM_ID DESC OFFSET #{pi.offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pi.limit} ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO EVENT_PROMOTION ( APP_ID, PROM_TITLE, PROM_DETAIL, CREATE_DATE, VIEWS ) VALUES ( #{appId}, #{promoTitle}, #{promoDetail}, SYSDATE, 0 )
SELECT PROM_ID FROM EVENT_PROMOTION WHERE APP_ID = #{appId} ORDER BY CREATE_DATE DESC, PROM_ID DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY

INSERT INTO IMAGE ( IMG_TYPE, ORIGIN_NAME, CHANGE_NAME, CREATE_DATE, REF_NO, IMG_ORDER ) VALUES ( 'P', #{originalFilename}, #{posterPath}, SYSDATE, #{promoId}, 1 )
SELECT IMG_NO FROM IMAGE WHERE REF_NO = #{promoId} AND IMG_TYPE = 'P' ORDER BY IMG_NO DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY
mapper.select: SELECT EP.PROM_ID, EP.PROM_TITLE, EP.PROM_DETAIL, EP.CREATE_DATE, EP.UPDATE_DATE, EP.VIEWS, I.CHANGE_NAME AS POSTER_PATH, I.ORIGIN_NAME AS ORIGINAL_FILENAME, I.IMG_NO, EA.WEBSITE AS PROMOTION_PAGE_URL, AS2.STAT_CODE AS IS_PROMOTED, EA.APP_ID, U.NICKNAME AS PROMO_WRITER, EA.START_DATE AS START_DATE, EA.END_DATE AS END_DATE FROM EVENT_PROMOTION EP JOIN EVENT_APPLICATION EA ON EP.APP_ID = EA.APP_ID LEFT JOIN APP_STATUS AS2 ON EA.STAT_CODE = AS2.STAT_CODE LEFT JOIN IMAGE I ON EP.PROM_ID = I.REF_NO AND I.IMG_TYPE = 'P' LEFT JOIN USERS U ON EA.USER_NO = U.USER_NO WHERE EP.PROM_ID = #{promoId}
mapper.update: UPDATE EVENT_PROMOTION SET PROM_TITLE = #{promoTitle}, PROM_DETAIL = #{promoDetail}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE PROM_ID = #{promoId}
